---
title: "Synthetic Geology: Structural Geology Meets Deep Learning"
subtitle: "AIM-SI Optimization, AI, and Inverse Problems Workshop"
date: 2026-02-11
description: >-
  Lightning talk at the AIM-SI Optimization, AI, and Inverse Problems Workshop at UBC, presenting our work on generative modeling for structural geology.
categories:
  - Talk
  - Structural Geology
  - Generative AI

image: imgs/Slide1.PNG
draft: false
---

## Workshop

**Optimization, AI, and Inverse Problems Workshop**
Hosted by Dr. Ahmet Alacaoglu at UBC.

This workshop brought together researchers and practitioners interested in optimization and its applications in AI and inverse problems, exploring the fundamentals of optimization algorithms and their applications in training AI models, as well as solving problems in key scientific applications such as geophysics, medical imaging, and physics.

Key themes included:

- Adaptive optimization algorithms
- Structured optimization
- Applications of optimization algorithms in scientific applications
- High-dimensional problems, large datasets, limited computational resources, and application-specific constraints

## Slides

![Slide 5](imgs/Slide5.PNG)

![Slide 6](imgs/Slide6.PNG)

![Slide 7](imgs/Slide7.PNG)

![Slide 8](imgs/Slide8.PNG)

![Slide 9](imgs/Slide9.PNG)

![Slide 10](imgs/Slide10.PNG)

![Slide 11](imgs/Slide11.PNG)

![Slide 12](imgs/Slide12.PNG)

![Slide 13](imgs/Slide13.PNG)

![Slide 14](imgs/Slide14.PNG)

![Slide 15](imgs/Slide15.PNG)
